summary: Business Segments and Note 19: Geographic Areas . Beginning in the first quarter of 2026, the Real Estate, Energy and Natural Resources (Real Estate & ENR) segment will be renamed Strategic Land Solutions. The segment will include the following businesses: Real Estate, Natural Resources and Climate Solutions.
